nasb.text: For the rich men of the city are full of violence, Her residents speak lies, And their tongue is deceitful in their mouth.

esv.text: Your rich men are full of violence; your inhabitants speak lies, and their tongue is deceitful in their mouth.

cnv.text: 城裡的財主充滿了強暴， 其中的居民也說假話； 他們口中的舌頭是詭詐的。

ccb.text: 城中的富人残暴成性， 居民谎话连篇， 满口诡诈之言。
